meaning.it: Cigarettes are bad for your health. 悪い -- bad

cards.reading: おてあらい

cards.front: お手洗いはどこですか。
cards.reading: おてあらい は どこ です か

meaning.en: Where's the bathroom? お手洗い -- toilet, bathroom
meaning.it: Where's the bathroom? お手洗い -- toilet, bathroom

cards.reading: ごしゅじん

cards.front: ご主人はお元気ですか。

meaning.en: How is your husband? ご主人 -- (your) husband
meaning.it: How is your husband? ご主人 -- (your) husband

cards.reading: ほんとうに

cards.front: あなたが本当に好きです。

meaning.en: I really like you. 本当に -- really, truly
meaning.it: I really like you. 本当に -- really, truly

cards.reading: じぶん

cards.front: 宿題は自分でやりなさい。

meaning.en: Do your homework by yourself. 自分 -- self, oneself

cards.front: 柿の木に実がたくさんなっています。
cards.reading: かきのき に み が たくさん なって います

meaning.it: A lot of fruit is ripening on the persimmon tree. なる -- become ripe

cards.front: これは医者のためのサイトです。

meaning.it: This is a site for doctors. ため -- sake, purpose

meaning.it: The curry and rice is 700 yen. 円 -- yen

cards.reading: ばあい

meaning.en: take a day off, take a break
meaning.it: take a day off, take a break
